remaining_params.StackDescription: REP Up to one target creature_{c:Targeted}
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select up to one target creature
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Up to one target creature's base power perpetually becomes equal to its toughness. It perpetually gains "This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender."
